title: Same-Model Fashion Try-On Campaign
description: Lock one model's identity while rotating wardrobe, styling direction, and seasonal looks for fashion commerce, editorial, and campaign usage.

en.title: Same-Model Fashion Try-On Campaign
en.description: Lock one model's identity while rotating wardrobe, styling direction, and seasonal looks for fashion commerce, editorial, and campaign usage.

zh-CN.title: 同模特换装 campaign
zh-CN.description: 同一个人锁脸锁身形，只切换服装、配饰、鞋包、层搭和季节风格，做成商业 lookbook 或上新宣传图。
